_comment: BIV portfolio config. ats: greenhouse | lever | ashby | workable | recruitee | breezy | gusto | null. When ats is null, the company appears on the board with a 'View careers page' link only (the scraper still tries to auto-detect an ATS on the careers page). Fill in ats/slug as companies confirm their ATS. For gusto, slug is the full board id from the jobs.gusto.com/boards/<slug> URL. logo + description are sourced from Visible (BIV portfolio profiles); logo falls back to icon.horse / favicon / initials if the URL ever fails.
